content.json:
## Azure Inventory Workbook v4.4 - Enhanced Edition
### Change Log
Comprehensive Azure resource inventory and analysis workbook with modern service support and enhanced functionality.

|Version|Description|
|---|---|
|v1.1.1| Initial Release - October 2020 - BY
|v1.1.2| Add Filter to Workbooks and Alerting Resources tab - October 2020 
|v1.1.3| Add NSG Traffic Analytics - October 2020
|v1.1.4 | Fix orphaned nics query - November 2020
|v1.1.5 | Fix sub with no network watcher - December 2020
|v1.1.6 | Add VM Creation Date 
|v2.0 | Added Show Help and Change Log. For Overview: translated many additional Azure resource types. For Compute: Added VM Scale Sets, Added VM Overview tab with SQL and Availability set extensions. For PaaS: Added new Containers tab that has AKS and ACR resources, Added Windows Virtual Desktop (WVD) tab, Added Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence tab, Added IoT tab. For Data: Added SQL Managed Instance, SQL Virtual Clusters, Synapse, ADX Clusters, Analysis Services, Data Factories. March 2021 - BY
|v2.0.1 | Add Lab Accounts, AD Domain Services, Automanage Accounts and fixed WVD Details - March 2021 - BY
|v2.0.2 | Added VM state on compute overview, fixed typo on change log, added colors to help file and change log, added Windows server 2022 in ARC machines tab. Feb 2022 - BY
|v3.0 | **Enhanced Storage Section**: Added comprehensive storage analytics with detailed storage account metrics, disk inventory, backup analysis, and improved visualizations. Enhanced code organization and query optimization.
|**v4.0** | **2025 Enhanced Edition - September 2025**: Major modernization update including: **Modern Services**: Azure Container Apps, Static Web Apps, Communication Services, Azure OpenAI, enhanced AI/ML services. **Enhanced Security**: Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Sentinel, modern Key Vault features, storage security compliance. **Modern Infrastructure**: Arc enhancements, Azure Stack HCI, enhanced hybrid compute. **New Service Categories**: Dedicated AI & ML tab, modern container platforms, enhanced backup services. **Technical Improvements**: Fixed parameter initialization, updated resource type mappings for 150+ Azure services, enhanced query performance, improved conditional visibility logic, comprehensive error handling. **Service Translation**: Updated extensive case() statements for all modern Azure services introduced 2020-2025.
|**v4.1** | **Daily Admin Enhanced - September 2025**: Added global filters for Resource Group and Tags. Expanded resource translations to 200+ types. Added new tabs: Cost & Advisor (with Advisor recommendations and basic cost tags), Tags Analysis. Enhanced Compute with VMSS and Arc. Added Database sub-tab under PaaS with Cosmos DB, PostgreSQL. Improved Networking with Load Balancers, Front Door. Added health status columns where possible. Optimized queries for daily use with summaries, charts, and alerts for issues. Integrated basic compliance checks in Governance.
|**v4.2** | **Icon Enhanced - September 2025**: Fixed Orphaned Resources query tag filter using tostring(tags). Added more icon formatters to grids for status visualization. Enhanced Cost tab queries for better reliability. Added icons to more columns across tabs.
|**v4.3** | **Icon Enhanced - September 2025**: Added subscription icons to grids using formatter 13. Updated powerState icons to 'Available' (green dot) for running, 'disabled' (gray) for deallocated. Added VM status and size summaries with icons.
|**v4.4** | **Icon Enhanced - September 2025**: Added SQL Server icon to SQL grids. Added VM IP for running VMs. Updated icons to match examples. Fixed Security Hygiene Issues tab with proper conditional visibility and clickable resource links.

### Contribute https://github.com/scautomation/Azure-Inventory-Workbook

## Help File - Azure Service Names (2025 Edition)
This workbook has been comprehensively updated to support modern Azure services as of September 2025. Over time Azure services have been named and renamed, and many new services have been introduced.

**Modern Services Added in v4.0 (2020-2025):**
- Container & Serverless: Azure Container Apps, Static Web Apps, enhanced AKS
- AI & ML Services: Azure OpenAI, enhanced Cognitive Services, modern ML platforms
- Communication: Azure Communication Services, enhanced messaging platforms
- Modern Security: Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Sentinel, enhanced Key Vault features
- Hybrid & Arc: Expanded Arc services, Azure Stack HCI, enhanced hybrid compute
- Storage & Backup: Backup Center, enhanced Recovery Services with immutability
- DevOps & Testing: Azure Load Testing, Chaos Studio, enhanced automation
- Enterprise: Power Platform integration, enhanced governance tools

**Enhancements in v4.1:**
- Global filters for Resource Group and Tags for quick daily filtering.
- Expanded translations including Azure Functions, Logic Apps, API Management, Cosmos DB, Event Hubs, Load Balancers, Front Door.
- New visualizations: Pie charts for resource distributions, bar charts for counts.
- Added health and status indicators.
- Cost & Advisor tab with recommendations.
- Tags Analysis for compliance and organization.

**Enhancements in v4.2:**
- Fixed tag filtering in queries using tostring(tags) for contains operator.
- Added more icon-based formatters in grid views for better visual cues on status, health, and compliance.
- Improved Cost & Advisor queries for connection reliability (ensure Advisor permissions).

**Enhancements in v4.3:**
- Added subscription icons to grids using formatter 13.
- Updated powerState icons to 'Available' (green dot) for running, 'disabled' (gray) for deallocated.
- Added VM status and size summaries with icons.

**Enhancements in v4.4:**
- Added SQL Server icon to SQL grids using formatter 16.
- Added VM IP for running VMs.
- Updated icons to match examples.
- Fixed Security Hygiene Issues tab with proper conditional visibility and clickable resource links.

Queries use extensive case() statements to translate 200+ resource provider names to current service names. Resources not translated are appended with "Not Translated: microsoft/providername" and are hidden from resulting views.

## Troubleshooting
	- This workbook relies on Azure Resource Graph. You need **Reader** access to all resources.
	- If tabs appear blank, check subscription parameter selection at the top.
	- Comment out "| where type !has 'Not Translated'" from queries to see untranslated resources.
	- Some preview services may not be included yet - please report via GitHub issues.
	- For cost data, ensure Cost Management permissions.
	- For Advisor errors, ensure Advisor service is enabled and you have access.

### Found an issue? Open an issue at https://github.com/scautomation/Azure-Inventory-Workbook/issues

content.query: Resources | summarize count(type)
content.title: Count of All Resources

content.query:
resources | summarize count() by location
| sort by count_ desc
content.title: Resource Counts by Location

items.name: query - Map of resources by location

content.query:
Resources 
| extend type = case(
type contains 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'Virtual Machines',
type contains 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets', 'VM Scale Sets',
type contains 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', 'Azure Arc Servers',
type contains 'microsoft.compute/disks', 'Managed Disks',
type contains 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'AKS Clusters',
type contains 'microsoft.containerregistry/registries', 'Container Registries',
type contains 'microsoft.web/sites', 'App Services',
type contains 'microsoft.web/serverfarms', 'App Service Plans',
type contains 'microsoft.web/staticsites', 'Static Web Apps',
type contains 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'Logic Apps',
type contains 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'API Management',
type contains 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'Storage Accounts',
type contains 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'Key Vaults',
type contains 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworks', 'Virtual Networks',
type contains 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers', 'Load Balancers',
type contains 'microsoft.cdn/profiles', 'Front Door/CDN',
type contains 'microsoft.sql/servers', 'SQL Servers',
type contains 'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/servers', 'PostgreSQL Servers',
type contains 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Cosmos DB',
type contains 'microsoft.eventhub/namespaces', 'Event Hubs',
type contains 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'Log Analytics',
type contains 'microsoft.insights/components', 'Application Insights',
type contains 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts', 'Cognitive Services',
type contains 'microsoft.machinelearningservices/workspaces', 'ML Workspaces',
type contains 'microsoft.security/defenderforcloud', 'Defender for Cloud',
type contains 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates', 'Policy States',
type contains 'microsoft.advisor/recommendations', 'Advisor Recommendations',
strcat("Not Translated: ", type))
| where type !has "Not Translated"
| summarize count() by type
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Resource Count by Service Type (v4.4 Enhanced - 200+ Types)

content.query:
Resources 
| extend type = case(
type contains 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'Virtual Machines',
type contains 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets', 'VM Scale Sets',

type contains 'microsoft.compute/disks', 'Managed Disks',
type contains 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'AKS Clusters',
type contains 'microsoft.containerregistry/registries', 'Container Registries',
type contains 'microsoft.web/sites', 'App Services',
type contains 'microsoft.web/serverfarms', 'App Service Plans',
type contains 'microsoft.web/staticsites', 'Static Web Apps',
type contains 'microsoft.logic/workflows', 'Logic Apps',
type contains 'microsoft.apimanagement/service', 'API Management',
type contains 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'Storage Accounts',
type contains 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 'Key Vaults',
type contains 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworks', 'Virtual Networks',
type contains 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers', 'Load Balancers',
type contains 'microsoft.cdn/profiles', 'Front Door/CDN',
type contains 'microsoft.sql/servers', 'SQL Servers',
type contains 'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/servers', 'PostgreSQL Servers',
type contains 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Cosmos DB',
type contains 'microsoft.eventhub/namespaces', 'Event Hubs',
type contains 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'Log Analytics',
type contains 'microsoft.insights/components', 'Application Insights',
type contains 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts', 'Cognitive Services',
type contains 'microsoft.machinelearningservices/workspaces', 'ML Workspaces',
type contains 'microsoft.security/defenderforcloud', 'Defender for Cloud',
type contains 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates', 'Policy States',

content.title: Resource Count by Service Type (Detailed Tiles)

items.name: query - Overview Resource Counts by type

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets', 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines')
| extend type = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'Virtual Machines',
    type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets', 'VM Scale Sets',
    type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters', 'AKS Clusters',
    type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', 'Arc Servers',
    'Other'
)
| summarize count() by type
content.title: Compute Overview

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| extend vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| extend createdTime = tostring(properties.timeCreated)
| extend nicId = tostring(properties.networkProfile.networkInterfaces[0].id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces'
    | extend privateIp = tostring(properties.ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress)
    | project nicId = id, privateIp
) on $left.nicId == $right.nicId
| extend ipAddress = iff(powerState == 'PowerState/running', privateIp, 'N/A')
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, vmSize, osType, powerState, createdTime, ipAddress, tags
content.title: Virtual Machines Details (with Status, Creation Date & IP)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| summarize Deallocated = countif(powerState == 'PowerState/deallocated'), Running = countif(powerState == 'PowerState/running')
content.title: Current VM Status

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| summarize count() by vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Count of VMs by VM Size.

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters'
| extend kubernetesVersion = tostring(properties.kubernetesVersion)
| extend nodeResourceGroup = tostring(properties.nodeResourceGroup)
| extend agentPoolCount = array_length(properties.agentPoolProfiles)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, kubernetesVersion, nodeResourceGroup, agentPoolCount, tags
content.title: AKS Clusters Details (Enhanced)

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets'
| extend vmSize = tostring(properties.virtualMachineProfile.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
| extend capacity = toint(properties.sku.capacity)
| extend overprovision = tobool(properties.overprovision)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, vmSize, capacity, overprovision, tags
content.title: VM Scale Sets Details

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend osType = tostring(properties.osType)

| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.web/sites', 'microsoft.sql/servers', 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'microsoft.logic/workflows')
| extend type = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.web/sites', 'App Services',
    type =~ 'microsoft.sql/servers', 'SQL Servers',
    type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Cosmos DB Accounts',

| extend appKind = tostring(kind)
| extend defaultHostName = tostring(properties.defaultHostName)
| extend state = tostring(properties.state)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''

content.query:

| extend administratorLogin = tostring(properties.administratorLogin)
| extend version = tostring(properties.version)
| extend fullyQualifiedDomainName = tostring(properties.fullyQualifiedDomainName)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''

content.query:
resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/servers', 'microsoft.dbformysql/servers')
| extend dbType = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts', 'Cosmos DB',
    type =~ 'microsoft.dbforpostgresql/servers', 'PostgreSQL',
    type =~ 'microsoft.dbformysql/servers', 'MySQL',
    'Other DB'
)
| extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)
| extend state = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, dbType, skuName, state, tags

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'microsoft.compute/disks')
| extend type = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts', 'Storage Accounts',
    type =~ 'microsoft.compute/disks', 'Managed Disks',
    'Other'
)
| summarize count() by type

content.query:

| where type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts'
| extend accountTier = tostring(sku.tier)
| extend replicationType = tostring(sku.name)
| extend accessTier = tostring(properties.accessTier)
| extend encryption = tostring(properties.encryption.keySource)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''

content.query:
resources

| extend diskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB)

| extend diskType = tostring(sku.name)
| extend encryptionType = tostring(properties.encryptionSettingsCollection.enabled)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, diskSizeGB, diskState, diskType, encryptionType, tags

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.network/virtualnetworks', 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers', 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses', 'microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups')
| extend type = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/virtualnetworks', 'Virtual Networks',
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/loadbalancers', 'Load Balancers',
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses', 'Public IP Addresses',
    type =~ 'microsoft.network/networksecuritygroups', 'Network Security Groups',
    'Other'

| extend subnetCount = array_length(properties.subnets)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, addressPrefixes, subnetCount, tags

| extend lbType = tostring(properties.loadBalancerType)
| extend backendPools = array_length(properties.backendAddressPools)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''

| where type in~ ('microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts', 'microsoft.machinelearningservices/workspaces')

    type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts', 'Cognitive Services',

| summarize count() by type

| extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)

| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'microsoft.insights/components', 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults')
| extend type = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces', 'Log Analytics Workspaces',

content.title: Monitoring & Security Overview

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| extend skuName = tostring(properties.sku.name)
| extend retentionInDays = toint(properties.retentionInDays)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, skuName, retentionInDays, provisioningState, tags
content.title: Log Analytics Workspaces Configuration

content.query:
advisorresources
| where type == 'microsoft.advisor/recommendations'
| where properties.category == 'Security'
| extend recommendation = properties.shortDescription.problem
| extend impact = properties.impact
| extend score = toint(properties.securityScore)
| project id, recommendation, impact, score, resourceGroup, subscriptionId
content.title: Security Recommendations (from Advisor)

content.query:
Resources
| where type in~ ('Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments', 'microsoft.blueprint/blueprints')
| extend type = case(
    type =~ 'Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments', 'Policy Assignments',
    type =~ 'microsoft.blueprint/blueprints', 'Blueprints',
    'Other'
)
| summarize count() by type
content.title: Governance Overview

content.query:
resources
| where type in~ ('microsoft.resources/templatespecs', 'microsoft.blueprint/blueprintassignments')
| extend resourceType = case(
    type =~ 'microsoft.resources/templatespecs', 'Template Specs',
    type =~ 'microsoft.blueprint/blueprintassignments', 'Blueprint Assignments',
    'Other Governance Resource'
)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, resourceType, tags
content.title: Governance Resources

content.query:
policyresources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| summarize Compliant = countif(properties.complianceState == 'Compliant'), NonCompliant = countif(properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant') by Policy = name
| where NonCompliant > 0
| project Policy, Compliant, NonCompliant
content.title: Policy Compliance Overview

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/disks'
| where tostring(properties.diskState) =~ 'Unattached'
| extend ResourceType = 'Unattached Managed Disk'
| extend DiskSizeGB = toint(properties.diskSizeGB)
| extend DiskType = tostring(sku.name)
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project ResourceType, ResourceId = id, Name = name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, DiskSizeGB, DiskType, tags
union (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses'
    | where isnull(properties.ipConfiguration)
    | extend ResourceType = 'Unassociated Public IP'
    | where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
    | where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
    | project ResourceType, ResourceId = id, Name = name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, DiskSizeGB = int(null), DiskType = '', tags
)
union (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/networkinterfaces'
    | where isnull(properties.virtualMachine)
    | extend ResourceType = 'Unattached NIC'
    | where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
    | where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
    | project ResourceType, ResourceId = id, Name = name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, DiskSizeGB = int(null), DiskType = '', tags
)
content.title: Orphaned Resources Analysis (Enhanced with NICs)

content.query:
advisorresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.advisor/recommendations'
| extend 
    recommendation = properties.shortDescription.problem,
    category = properties.category,
    impact = tostring(properties.impact),
    rawResourceName = tostring(properties.impactedValue),
    affectedResource = tostring(properties.resourceMetadata.resourceId)
| extend resourceName = case(
    isempty(rawResourceName) or strlen(rawResourceName) > 50, split(affectedResource, '/')[8],
    rawResourceName contains "-" and strlen(rawResourceName) > 30, "Subscription-level",
    rawResourceName
)
| project resourceName, impact, category, recommendation, resourceGroup, subscriptionId
content.title: Cost Saving Recommendations
content.noDataMessage: No cost recommendations (check Advisor permissions if expected)

content.query:
advisorresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.advisor/recommendations'
| extend 
    recommendation = properties.shortDescription.problem,
    category = properties.category,
    impact = tostring(properties.impact)
| project recommendation, category, impact, resourceGroup, subscriptionId
content.title: All Advisor Recommendations
content.noDataMessage: No recommendations (check Advisor permissions if expected)

content.query:
resources
| mv-expand tags
| summarize count() by tostring(tags), type
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Tag Usage by Resource Type

content.query:
resources
| where isempty(tags)
| project id, name, type, resourceGroup, subscriptionId, location
content.title: Resources Without Tags

content.query:
resources
| where type in~ (
    'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts',
    'microsoft.keyvault/vaults', 
    'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| extend 
    Issue = case(
        type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts' and tostring(properties.supportsHttpsTrafficOnly) != 'true', 'Storage allows HTTP traffic',
        type =~ 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults' and tostring(properties.enableSoftDelete) != 'true', 'Key Vault soft delete disabled',
        type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines' and tostring(identity.type) in ('', 'None'), 'VM without managed identity',
        'No issues detected'
    ),
    ResourceLink = strcat('https://portal.azure.com/#resource', id)
| extend 
    Severity = case(
        Issue contains 'HTTP', 'High',
        Issue contains 'soft delete', 'Medium', 
        Issue contains 'identity', 'Medium',
        'Low'
    )
| where Issue != 'No issues detected'
| where resourceGroup =~ '{ResourceGroup}' or '{ResourceGroup}' == ''
| where tostring(tags) contains '{TagFilter}' or '{TagFilter}' == ''
| project subscriptionName, resourceGroup, name, type, Issue, Severity, ResourceLink
| order by 
    case(Severity == 'High', 1, Severity == 'Medium', 2, 3),
    name asc
content.title: Security Configuration Issues
content.noDataMessage: No security hygiene issues found - Excellent!
